name: Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the sugar, margarine, cocoa, and milk to a boil.
2. Boil for 2 minutes only, then remove from heat.
3. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
4. In a bowl, mix together 2 1/2 cups of oatmeal and 1/2 cup coconut.
5. Pour the boiling mixture over the oatmeal and coconut mixture and blend well.
6. Press into an 8x8 pan or drop by teaspoonfuls onto wax paper.
7. Refrigerate until set.
